hs_broadcast
module hs_broadcast #(
parameter 
integer 
Handshakes
 = 
2
)
(
hs_io.flw 
flw_hs,
hs_io.ldr 
ldr_hs[Handshakes]
)
Ports
flw_hs
hs_io.flw

Interface to broadcast

ldr_hs
hs_io.ldr ×[Handshakes]

Broadcast recipients

Parameters
Handshakes
parameter integer

The number of handshakes in the ldr_hs hs_io handshake array
